title: Vanilla 8x pixels
description: Halving Minecraft's original 16x16 pixel resolution to 8x8 without altering the style. :)
body:
This is a resource pack crafted in the style of the Vanilla edition, which replaces the original 16x16 pixel texture with an 8x8 version, giving it a small block-like appearance.

Enjoy your gaming experience! :)
